title: Rathe Palror
content:
{{Top|leg}} {{Character |type=Rebel |image=[[File:Rathe_Palror.jpg]] |name=Rathe Palror |homeworld= |birth= |death= |species=[[Tunroth]] |gender=[[Gender/Legends|Male]] |pronouns=new |height= |mass= |hair= |feathers= |eyes= |skin=[[Color/Legends|Yellow]] |cyber= |families=new |parents=new |partners=new |siblings=new |children=new |affiliation=*[[Churhee's Riflemen]] *[[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]] |masters= |apprentices= }} {{Quote|You all right?''"
"''I am not hurt. I was merely temporarily disabled.|[[Maranne Darmic]] and Rathe Palror|"[[Side Trip]]"}} '''Rathe Palror''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Tunroth]] [[Mercenary/Legends|mercenary]] who served as a member of [[Churhee's Riflemen]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He also was a crew member of the ''[[Hopskip]]'' that was sent on a [[Capture of Zekka Thyne|mission]] by [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] in [[2 ABY/Legends|2 ABY]]. He was a twelfth-class [[Tunroth Hunter]], also known as ''[[shturlan]]''. {{Char-stub}} ==Appearances== *"[[Side Trip]]" {{Reprint|Side Trip}} {{1st}} ==Sources== *''[[Galaxy Guide 12: Aliens — Enemies and Allies]]'' {{1stm}} *''[[Ultimate Alien Anthology]]'' *''[[The Essential Reader's Companion]]'' ==Notes and references== {{Reflist}} {{DEFAULTSORT:Palror, Rathe}} [[Category:Alliance Military members]] [[Category:Males]] [[Category:Mercenaries]] [[Category:Tunroth]]
